HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT MARITZA HURTADO'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-29-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Phil Kilduff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lasalle Bank National Assoc. as Trustee for First Franklin Mortgage Loan Trust 2007-FF2, Mortgage Loan Asset-Backed Certificates Series 2007-FF2.
Plaintiff's Witness: John Farrell, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Maritza Hurtado.
Exhibit 1- Certified Copy Trustee's Deed Upon Sale-----------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 947 Innes St., San Francisco.
Past-due damages $9,800.00
Waived Costs, for a Total of $9,800.00
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and to prepare Judgment.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2008 Off Calendar

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Denied

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Sep-17-2008 Denied
